name: ashley-mobile
description: Ashley Mobile — companion app Android para Ashley desktop

scripts.init: npm install && npm run sync-assets && npx cap add android && npx cap sync android
scripts.build:debug: npm run sync-assets && npx cap sync android && cd android && gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.build:release: npm run sync-assets && npx cap sync android && cd android && gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.build:bundle: npm run sync-assets && npx cap sync android && cd android && gradlew bundleRelease
